metadata.description: Audit and execute evidence-based Spring Boot 3.5 to 4.x migrations

plugins.name: spring-boot4-upgrade
plugins.description: Audit, plan, execute, diagnose, and verify Spring Boot 3.5 to 4.x upgrades. 21 production-verified traps, Jackson 3 migration, Security 7 lambda DSL, virtual threads, JVM flags, K8s triage. Works with Claude Code and Codex CLI.
